channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Reliable Robotics raises funding for fully automated aircraft
item.description: Reliable Robotics has raised $160 million as it continues to develop and work toward FAA certification for its Reliable Autonomy System for civilian a...

item.title: The Download: introducing the Nature issue
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Introducing:...

item.title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it.
item.description: Fusion power could provide a steady, zero-emissions source of electricity in the future—if companies can get plants built and running. But a new study...

item.title: Cruz’ing through the terminal: A&K Robotics lands $8M for autonomous mobility
item.description: Investment is led by Business Development Bank of Canada’s Industrial Innovation Venture Fund and Vantage Futures to expand production and R&D capacit...

item.title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
item.description: Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and p...

item.title: Glydways brings in $170M to scale its AV technology
item.description: Glydways plans to build networks of autonomous vehicle expressways that move people at 10 times the throughput of today's technology. The post Glydway...

item.title: From EVs to robotics: Tesla targets 10M Optimus units with new Texas plant
item.description: Tesla begins Optimus production in Q2 2026, replacing Fremont’s legacy car lines, breaking ground in Texas as it scales toward a robotics-first future...

item.title: Learn about the latest advancements in healthcare robotics at the Robotics Summit & Expo

item.title: 3 things Michelle Kim is into right now
item.description: Isegye Idol If you thought K-pop was weird, virtual idols—humans who perform as anime-style digital characters via motion capture—will blow your mind....

item.title: Railway secures $100 million to challenge AWS with AI-native cloud infrastructure
item.description: Railway , a San Francisco-based cloud platform that has quietly amassed two million developers without spending a dollar on marketing, announced Thurs...

item.title: Claude Code costs up to $200 a month. Goose does the same thing for free.
item.description: The artificial intelligence coding revolution comes with a catch: it's expensive. Claude Code , Anthropic's terminal-based AI agent that can write, de...

item.title: Listen Labs raises $69M after viral billboard hiring stunt to scale AI customer interviews
item.description: Alfred Wahlforss was running out of options. His startup, Listen Labs , needed to hire over 100 engineers, but competing against Mark Zuckerberg's $10...

item.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
item.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot , the company's workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification...

item.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
item.description: Anthropic released Cowork on Monday, a new AI agent capability that extends the power of its wildly successful Claude Code tool to non-technical users...

item.title: Best Practices for Building the AI Development Platform in Government

item.description: By AI Trends Staff While AI in hiring is now widely used for writing job descriptions, screening candidates, and automating interviews, it poses a ris...

item.title: Advance Trustworthy AI and ML, and Identify Best Practices for Scaling AI

item.title: Novelty In The Game Of Go Provides Bright Insights For AI And Autonomous Vehicles
